race.description: Westlawn Finance Grafton Cup Day 16 July CB (Bm58)
race.comment: LADY ALABAMA (2) huge jump in class in the heavy (10) conditions with a battling fourth over 1590m at Ballina in BM82 grade. Assess on her narrow second here two-back, and well weighted with the 3kg claim. AUTUMN MISS (6) has needed the three runs this time in to bring her to her peak. Blinkers go on and no surprise to see her a little closer to the tempo. Finds a suitable race with the senior rider going aboard. BONFIDELITY (7) had been racing in career best form before she finished a distant last over 1900m at Armidale in BM66 class. Complete mystery last start and deserves another chance in this weaker grade. ALABAMA GIRL (8) has produced the two wins this campaign and goes okay on her home track. Strong through the line when second over 2000m at the Gold Coast Poly. Maps well on the quick back-up.
